query:
SELECT vcl.*, pv.variantCode, pv.variantName, c.companyName 
FROM variant_customer_links vcl
LEFT JOIN product_variants pv ON vcl.variantId = pv.id
LEFT JOIN companies c ON vcl.customerId = c.id
WHERE c.companyName = 'ABC Furniture';
